scoring_axes.I: Independence from R1 / Painlevé III queue (0-10)

primary_shortlist_top3.rationale: Top of the PSLQ-family stack; both directions are flagship publishability targets.

primary_shortlist_top3.problem: Apéry-extension witnesses for ζ(5), ζ(7), ζ(9)
primary_shortlist_top3.rationale: Irrationality of any one of ζ(2k+1) at k≥2 = Acta-class news; negative side weaker because Zudilin's bounds are hard to extend incrementally (P_pos − P_neg = +3, widest gap in shortlist pool).
PSLQ scan canonical use-case at 500 dps; well-precedented FP-rejection literature (Bailey–Borwein); CF-name-recognition.

contrast_shortlist_top3.rationale: Top of the PSLQ-family stack; both directions are flagship publishability targets.
PSLQ scan canonical use-case at 500 dps; well-precedented FP-rejection literature (Bailey–Borwein); CF-name-recognition.

contrast_shortlist_top3.problem: Lévy's constant β = π² / (12 log 2) — rationality / transcendence
contrast_shortlist_top3.rationale: Twin to Khinchin in score profile; literature recheck CLEARED both irrationality and transcendence as open (M1.1 audit).

primary_all_ranked.problem: Catalan's constant G — irrationality / algebraicity
primary_all_ranked.rationale: Top of the PSLQ-family stack; both directions are flagship publishability targets.

primary_all_ranked.problem: Apéry-extension witnesses for ζ(5), ζ(7), ζ(9)
primary_all_ranked.rationale: Irrationality of any one of ζ(2k+1) at k≥2 = Acta-class news; negative side weaker because Zudilin's bounds are hard to extend incrementally (P_pos − P_neg = +3, widest gap in shortlist pool).

primary_all_ranked.problem: Khinchin's constant K_0 — rationality / algebraicity
primary_all_ranked.rationale: PSLQ scan canonical use-case at 500 dps; well-precedented FP-rejection literature (Bailey–Borwein); CF-name-recognition.

primary_all_ranked.problem: Lévy's constant β = π² / (12 log 2) — rationality / transcendence
primary_all_ranked.rationale: Twin to Khinchin in score profile; literature recheck CLEARED both irrationality and transcendence as open (M1.1 audit).

primary_all_ranked.problem: Glaisher–Kinkelin generalized constants A_k (higher rank)
primary_all_ranked.rationale: Sub-flagship transcendence target; family-of-constants gives a compound positive but less news-worthy than G/K_0.

primary_all_ranked.problem: Stanley's plane-partition asymptotic constants (PSLQ-identify against special-value basis)
primary_all_ranked.rationale: PSLQ identification against special-value basis; combinatorics tier (Adv Math / J Comb Theory A).

primary_all_ranked.problem: Lehmer's totient problem (φ(n) | n − 1 ⇒ n prime?)
primary_all_ranked.rationale: PARI shell-out helps; extending ω(n) lower bound has narrative weight.

primary_all_ranked.problem: Sárközy-type pattern-avoidance density in sumset dynamics
primary_all_ranked.rationale: Additive-combinatorics tier; PARI qflll + greedy enumeration.

primary_all_ranked.problem: Andrews–Beck higher-rank partition-statistic identities
primary_all_ranked.rationale: Modulus-extension of Andrews–Beck verification; partition-theory tier publishability.

primary_all_ranked.problem: Brjuno function B(α) statistics at the irrational-rotation boundary
primary_all_ranked.rationale: Tangential connection to Painlevé via rotation-number / KAM but the question is dynamics-of-irrational-rotations, not Painlevé chart-map dynamics; independence preserved per #30 audit.

primary_all_ranked.problem: Zaremba's conjecture for alphabet A_5 = {1, 2, 3, 4, 5}
primary_all_ranked.rationale: CF machinery overlap with R1 (PCF infrastructure shared); negative (counterexample to A_5 = 5) is THE STRONG NEGATIVE in this category.

primary_all_ranked.problem: Beal conjecture for fixed signature (p, q, r)
primary_all_ranked.rationale: Signature-specific Beal disproof = significant; ruling-out is incremental.

primary_all_ranked.problem: Brown–Erdős–Sós conjecture for linear 3-uniform hypergraphs
primary_all_ranked.rationale: SAT-branching scales poorly; estimated 95h tight against 96h cap.

primary_all_ranked.problem: Erdős–Moser equation (1^k + 2^k + ... + (m-1)^k = m^k)
primary_all_ranked.rationale: Von Staudt–Clausen + p-adic exclusion; both directions equally publishable in mid-tier NT venues.

primary_all_ranked.problem: Mertens function sign-change density
primary_all_ranked.rationale: Heavy compute at 10^14; J Number Theory tier on positive side.

primary_all_ranked.problem: Erdős–Straus conjecture
primary_all_ranked.rationale: CRT-cover extension well-bounded; positive = incremental Math.Comp; negative = escaping residue class IS a structural finding (P_neg > P_pos here).

primary_all_ranked.problem: Hurst-exponent estimation for arithmetic dynamical sequences (Stern, Calkin–Wilf, Thomae)
primary_all_ranked.rationale: Numpy-only; doesn't leverage operator's strongest tools; statistical-fit publishability is weak.

primary_all_ranked.problem: Repunit primality density extension (R_n = (10^n − 1)/9)
primary_all_ranked.rationale: Single-shot verification at the next candidate; negative = boring absence.

primary_all_ranked.problem: Brocard's problem (n! + 1 = m²)
primary_all_ranked.rationale: Trivially bounded but cosmetic; both positive and negative are incremental records.

primary_all_ranked.problem: Mahler badly-approximable pairs in a fixed cubic number field
primary_all_ranked.rationale: PARI nfinit + qflll friction; cubic-field arithmetic less indep.

primary_all_ranked.problem: Lagrange spectrum values past Freiman's constant
primary_all_ranked.rationale: Same family as Markov, slightly weaker scoring.

primary_all_ranked.problem: Markov spectrum gap structure between 3 and Freiman's constant
primary_all_ranked.rationale: Tree enumeration combinatorially heavy; CF Diophantine but not PCF.

primary_all_ranked.problem: Pillai-style consecutive perfect-power gap conjectures
primary_all_ranked.rationale: Lowest publishability across the family; table extension only.

primary_all_ranked.problem: Stern–Brocot tree gap distribution at large levels
primary_all_ranked.rationale: Experimental-math note tier; clean but neither direction strong.

contrast_all_ranked.rationale: Top of the PSLQ-family stack; both directions are flagship publishability targets.
